user.title: Connect Newlab LED
user.description: Enter your smarthome.newlablight.com credentials. Use your **username** (e.g. `mario.rossi`), NOT your email address.

error.invalid_auth: Invalid credentials. Make sure you are using your Newlab username (e.g. `mario.rossi`), NOT your email address. Check your password too.
error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to Newlab cloud. Check your internet connection.
error.cannot_parse: Unrecognised HTML response. The site structure may have changed.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. Check the Home Assistant logs.
